title: JaTiMatic Content Pack [VPB]
description: A content pack based on Vic's Point Blank, adding the JaTiMatic 9x19 submachine gun, skins and attachments.
body:
# JaTiMatic Content Pack for Vic's Point Blank
A content pack for Vic's Point Blank, adding a 1980's JaTiMatic submachine gun and several attachments to it. The weapon have a nice model and animations.

##  How to install:
###  Requires:
-   ["Vic's Point Blank"](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank), 
-   ["Geckolib"](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
 ### Optional:
 -   ["JEI"](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
###  Guide for:
- Install "Vic's Point Blank" and "Geckolib", move it to your “mods” folder,
- Create a folder “pointblank” in your game folder,
- Without unzipping, move the zip folder “vpb-jatimatic-pack”,
- Start the game.
##  What it adds:
### - **Weapons:**
 - _JaTiMatic 9mm submachine gun._
  
    ![JaTiMatic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cc439bc94dbd101c80ac6b67f79f02c67d4b01c.png)
### - Attachments:
 - _210mm silencer barrel for JaTiMatic 9mm,_
 - _Artisanal mount for JaTiMatic 9mm,_
 - _Artisanal Picatinny rail for JaTiMatic 9mm,_
 - _C-86 laser module,_
 - _Folding buttstock for JaTiMatic 9mm._
  
  ![C-86 Laser Module [Recipe]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9ae5cfc7258d7808264f4ae20505cdb1055b264_0.webp)
### - Skins:
 - _Spray 'Tan',_
 - _Spray 'Brown',_
 - _Spray 'Coyote Brown,_
 - _Spray 'Olive',_
 - _Spray 'Artisanal'._
  
 ![Spray [Recipe]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/007d45a848d3db77a43421187af0da5001ef5bdc.png)
### - Misc:
 - _Plastic._

![Plastic [Recipe]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88ed5ef83af624c92cbe76b9c61bb21ac3967cb5.png)
